# Code RED source/decompiled export
# Source: related_apps/Code_RED_ScriptHookRDR_AI_Menu/patches/CodeRED_native_bridge_merge_notes.md
# SHA1: 46c521c920a5a3e3afe2cee355884b5d695beeee

# CodeRED Native Bridge Merge Notes

The uploaded package contains a compiled `CodeRED_AI_Menu.asi` with the native bridge working, but the bundled `Code_RED_ScriptHookRDR_AI_Menu/CodeRED_AI_Menu.cpp` is older and does not contain that native bridge source.

Do **not** rebuild the stale C++ source as-is or it will regress the spawn bridge.

Use these files as the merge reference instead:

```text
patches/CodeRED_AI_Menu_actor_enum_loader.diff
patches/CodeRED_AI_Menu_actor_enum_loader_reference.cpp
```

Merge the actor enum loader into Codex's current native-bridge source, then rebuild once.

## What to merge into the native bridge source

Add data paths:

```cpp
static std::string g_actorEnumMapPath = "data/codered/actor_enum_map.csv";
static bool g_dirtyActorMap = true;
static std::unordered_map<std::string, int> g_actorEnumMap;
static size_t g_actorEnumRowsLoaded = 0;
```

Add helpers from the reference file:

```cpp
lowerCopy
stripInlineComment
splitCsvLine
splitAliases
parseActorEnumToken
enumHex
displayRosterName
resolveInlineActorEnum
loadConfig actor_enum_map path support
loadActorEnumMap
selectedNpcRaw
selectedActorEnum
```

Wire into the existing native spawn path:

```cpp
const int actorEnum = selectedActorEnum();
if (actorEnum <= 0) {
    writeLog("Spawn failed: roster entry did not resolve to an actor enum: %s", selectedNpc().c_str());
    g_status = "No actor enum for: " + selectedNpc();
    return;
}
```

Then use the resolved `actorEnum` as the third argument to the existing `CREATE_ACTOR_IN_LAYOUT` native call.

Update reload behavior:

```cpp
if (key == VK_F5) {
    g_dirtyRoster = true;
    g_dirtyActorMap = true;
    g_status = "Reload requested";
    return;
}
```

Update menu display with resolved/unresolved enum text:

```cpp
const int actorEnum = selectedActorEnum();
if (actorEnum > 0) {
    drawLine(..., "ENUM: " + std::to_string(actorEnum) + " / " + enumHex(actorEnum), ...);
} else {
    drawLine(..., "ENUM: unresolved - add row in data/codered/actor_enum_map.csv", ...);
}
```

## After one rebuild

Actor changes are data-only:

```text
edit data/codered/actor_enum_map.csv
press F5 in game
spawn again
```

No recompile should be needed for each actor once this loader is merged.
